text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Marvelous! It delights me to see your ongoing
efforts and another spirited training session!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Therefore! I thought I would bring you a little
something to show my thanks!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: She hands me a gift that looks quite expensive.

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
A tasty selection of morsels! Yes, the finest of
iced creams!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
I hope this will help relieve some of your fatigue
from training in the scorching heat every day!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Do keep this a secret from Tazuna, if you would.
Solemnly swear it!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text: And with that, I shall take my leave!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It is indeed some of the best ice cream we've ever
had. Pure melt-in-your-mouth goodness!
